allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\soumu\\source\\FIGHTERS2\\new\\idle.png"\); "Size: {0} x {1}" -f $img.Width, $img.Height; "Frame count = 4 → frame size = {0} x {1}" -f \($img.Width / 4\), $img.Height; $img.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\soumu\\source\\FIGHTERS2\\fighter\\assets\\sprites\\leon\\walk_f\\05.png"\); "walk_f/05.png: {0}x{1}" -f $img.Width, $img.Height; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); for \($y = $bmp.Height - 1; $y -ge $bmp.Height - 8; $y--\) { $alpha_count = 0; for \($x = 0; $x -lt $bmp.Width; $x++\) { $c = $bmp.GetPixel\($x, $y\); if \($c.A -gt 5\) { $alpha_count++ } }; "row y=$y : non-transparent px = $alpha_count" }; $img.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\("00.png", "05.png"\)\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\soumu\\source\\FIGHTERS2\\fighter\\assets\\sprites\\leon\\walk_f\\$f"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); $samples = @\(\); foreach \($pos in @\(@\(50, 50\), @\(50, 1500\), @\(900, 50\), @\(900, 1500\), @\(50, 750\), @\(900, 750\)\)\) { $c = $bmp.GetPixel\($pos[0], $pos[1]\); $samples += "\($\($pos[0]\),$\($pos[1]\)\)=A:$\($c.A\) RGB:\($\($c.R\),$\($c.G\),$\($c.B\)\)" }; "{0} → $\($samples -join ' | '\)" -f $f; $img.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\) })
